tasks.prompt:
Run a security and quality audit for the Medal-Social/pilot repo:

1. Check Socket.dev scores: fetch https://socket.dev/npm/package/@medalsocial/pilot and report current scores
2. Check Scorecard: run `gh api repos/Medal-Social/pilot/code-scanning/alerts --jq '.[] | select(.state == "open")'` and report any open alerts
3. Check npm audit: run `pnpm audit` and report any vulnerabilities
4. Check outdated deps: run `pnpm --filter @medalsocial/pilot outdated` and report what needs updating
5. Run tests: run `pnpm test -- --run` and report any failures

Summarize findings and suggest fixes for anything critical.
